title: Accurate Open-Loop Control of a Soft Continuum Robot Through Visually Learned Latent Representations
summary: This work addresses open-loop control of a soft continuum robot (SCR) from video-learned latent dynamics. Visual Oscillator Networks (VONs) from previous work are used, that provide mechanistically interpretable 2D oscillator latents through an attention broadcast decoder (ABCD). Open-loop, single-shooting optimal control is performed in latent space to track image-specified waypoints without camera feedback. An interactive SCR live simulator enables design of static, dynamic, and extrapolated targets and maps them to model-specific latent waypoints. On a two-segment pneumatic SCR, Koopman, MLP, and oscillator dynamics, each with and without ABCD, are evaluated on setpoint and dynamic trajectories. ABCD-based models consistently reduce image-space tracking error. The VON and ABCD-based Koopman models attains the lowest MSEs. Using an ablation study, we demonstrate that several architecture choices and training settings contribute to the open-loop control performance. Simulation stress tests further confirm static holding, stable extrapolated equilibria, and plausible relaxation to the rest state. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first demonstration that interpretable, video-learned latent dynamics enable reliable long-horizon open-loop control of an SCR.
tldr: This paper presents a method for open-loop control of a soft continuum robot using video-learned latent dynamics, achieving accurate tracking without camera feedback through interpretable 2D oscillator latents and optimal control in latent space.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种利用视频学习的潜在动力学实现软连续体机器人开环控制的方法，通过可解释的二维振荡器潜在空间和最优控制，在没有摄像头反馈的情况下实现精确跟踪。
summary_zh: 本研究探讨了基于视频学习潜在动力学实现软体连续机器人（SCR）开环控制的方法。采用先前研究中的视觉振荡器网络（VON），通过注意力广播解码器（ABCD）提供机械可解释的二维振荡器潜在表征。在潜在空间实施开环单次射击最优控制，无需相机反馈即可跟踪图像指定路径点。交互式SCR实时仿真器支持设计静态、动态及外推目标，并将其映射至模型特定的潜在路径点。在双段气动SCR平台上，对包含/不包含ABCD的Koopman、MLP及振荡器动力学模型分别进行设定点跟踪和动态轨迹评估。基于ABCD的模型能持续降低图像空间跟踪误差，其中VON与基于ABCD的Koopman模型获得最低均方误差。通过消融实验验证，多种架构选择与训练设置共同影响开环控制性能。仿真压力测试进一步证实了静态保持、稳定外推平衡态及合理回归静止状态的能力。据我们所知，这是首次证明可解释的视频学习潜在动力学能够实现SCR可靠的长时域开环控制。
